description: An agent is holding an open house. They need to market it and manage sign-ins.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the open house for Saturday from 1-4 PM in the MLS.

expected_outcome.value: The open house event is successfully added to the MLS listing.

nodes.task_description: Create a digital sign-in form for the event.

expected_outcome.value: A web form to capture visitor names and contact information is created.

nodes.task_description: After the event, import the sign-in data into the CRM as new leads.

expected_outcome.value: All open house visitors are added as new contacts in the CRM for follow-up.
